title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER A — Three Little Pigs (Papa LOCKED at FRONT, visible huff-puff, v2)
reuseAssetNote: ONE 15s render of Papa-as-cartoon-wolf LOCKED at the FRONT of the tower-house (Sara peeking from LEFT window, Eva peeking from RIGHT window). Looped 6× with crossfade to fill the 90s music block (75% of original 120s, per user feedback). Loop choreography: in-place wolf wiggle → cheek-puff → gentle blow → defeated slump → repeat.

usedUnderSongs.song: assets/music/Little Pigs Let Me Come In.mp3

preRenderNote: v2 redesign — fixes the v1 multi-position-path bug where Papa was described pacing LEFT then BACK then RIGHT then FRONT (4 named positions made Kling spawn multiple Papas). Now Papa stays LOCKED at the FRONT of the tower throughout the 15s render. The visible huff-puff (cheek-puff + gentle blow) is the action centerpiece. Composition anchored by the Nano Banana 3-character group still (group_ep13_clipA_three_little_pigs.png).
prompt: Wide cinematic kid-show family-comedy shot at @playground-tower-hou — wooden tower platform with closed-side panel walls + clear window openings, soft mulch ground at the bottom of the frame, soft warm afternoon light. The composition is anchored by the @ep13-clipA-group pre-rendered group still — exactly THREE figures: Papa standing on the mulch directly in FRONT of the tower, Sara peeking from the LEFT window opening, Eva peeking from the RIGHT window opening. Papa stays LOCKED at the FRONT of the tower throughout the entire 15s. Papa does NOT pace, does NOT walk, does NOT change positions. Sara stays at her LEFT window throughout. Eva stays at her RIGHT window throughout. Exactly THREE people in the entire frame. Only Papa's facial expression and arm gestures change between beats — his body stays planted in front of the tower. Papa wears a soft floppy wolf-ear headband (NOT a scary costume), big silly warm dad-grin, NEVER scary, NEVER growly. (BEAT 1, 0-5s) Papa stays planted, both hands gently wiggling like playful wolf paws near his cheeks. Soft cheerful sing-song mouth movements (silently mouthing the wolf-words, no specific lip-sync). Sara at LEFT window shakes her head NO playfully, both hands still gripping the window frame. Eva at RIGHT window shakes her head NO playfully, both hands still on the window frame. (BEAT 2, 5-10s) Papa (still planted) puffs his cheeks dramatically — visible huff-puff! — eyes crinkled with cheerful wind-up theatrics, both hands raised softly to his cheeks framing the puffed-cheek pose. Sara at LEFT window giggles, both hands still on window frame. Eva at RIGHT window giggles, both hands still on window frame. (BEAT 3, 10-15s) Papa (still planted) gently blows the air out softly — gentle wind-blow gesture, NOT a real strong blow — then theatrically slumps his shoulders in cheerful defeat, hands at his sides. Sara at LEFT window shakes her head NO triumphantly. Eva at RIGHT window shakes her head NO triumphantly. Designed to LOOP cleanly: Papa returns to his planted-at-front starting pose at second 15. Soft cartoon hot-dog-shape pastel confetti drifts gently down through the frame in soft sock-hop atmosphere. The mulch and tower stay plain clean. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both gripping window frame. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both gripping window frame. Papa stays planted in his single position throughout the entire 15s — never paces, never walks, never circles the tower. Both girls stay safely inside their tower windows throughout — no climbing out, no falling. NO scary wolf face, NO growl, NO dark lighting — pure cheerful kid-show comedy.
